# Scafati Woodworks

> Scafati Woodworks designs, builds, and installs custom cabinetry, built-ins, storage systems, and fine woodworking for homeowners across the Dallas–Fort Worth area.

Scafati Woodworks is a custom woodworking company serving Dallas–Fort Worth, Texas. Visitors can explore services and service areas, view project categories, and request a free quote. Contact: (817) 403-6044 or info@scafatiwoodworks.com.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/): Company overview, featured work, and quote request.
- [Kitchens](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/kitchens): Custom kitchen cabinetry and remodeling solutions.
- [Built-ins](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/built-ins): Custom built-in cabinetry and storage.
- [Closets](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/closets): Custom closet systems.
- [Services](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services): Complete woodworking service catalog.
- [About](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/about): Company background and approach.
- [Contact](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/contact): Contact details and free quote request form.
- [Service Areas](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/service-areas): Dallas–Fort Worth communities served.

## Services

- [Custom Cabinets](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/custom-cabinets)
- [Built-Ins](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/built-ins)
- [Entertainment Centers](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/entertainment-centers)
- [Custom Pantry Systems](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/custom-pantry-systems)
- [Mudroom Storage](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/mudroom-storage)
- [Laundry Room Cabinets](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/laundry-room-cabinets)
- [Bathroom Vanities](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/bathroom-vanities)
- [Cabinet Refacing](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/cabinet-refacing)
- [Floating Shelves](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/floating-shelves)
- [Accent Walls](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/accent-walls)
- [Lattice Wall Panels](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/lattice-wall-panels)
- [Custom Trim Work](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/custom-trim-work)
- [Custom Woodworking Projects](https://www.scafatiwoodworks.com/services/custom-woodworking)
